basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar)
basic_details.short_information: IIT Gandhinagar is recruiting 02 Junior Research Fellows in Mechanical Engineering.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: 30 years as on last date of application | remuneration: ₹46,990/- per month (including 27% HRA)
qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/B.E. in Mechanical, Electrical, Electronics, ECE, EEE, or Chemical Engineering with GATE qualification OR M.Tech/M.E. in relevant disciplines

how_to_apply: Interested candidates can apply online through the link: http://recruitment.iitgn.ac.in/projectstaff/
For any queries, contact: Prof. Atul Bhargav Email: [email protected]
important_instructions: The position is temporary and project-based. Fresh graduates are also encouraged to apply. Selection will be based on application and interview performance.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar JRF Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Applications are invited for temporary positions of Junior Research Fellow under the project titled “Demonstration of a Fuel Cell-based Power Pack Platform for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles” at IIT Gandhinagar. Principal Investigator: Prof. Atul Bhargav. Download IIT Gandhinagar JRF Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIT Gandhinagar is recruiting 02 Junior Research Fellows in Mechanical Engineering.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_gandhinag: Demonstration of a Fuel Cell-based Power Pack Platform for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles

rows.details: B.Tech/B.E. in Mechanical, Electrical, Electronics, ECE, EEE, or Chemical Engineering with GATE qualification OR M.Tech/M.E. in relevant disciplines
Hands-on experience in building experimental setups, CAD, technical drawing, teamwork, and communication skills
30 years as on last date of application

content_sections.heading: Job Description
content_sections.text: Apply engineering skills to design and build fuel cell systems, sub-systems, and components. Develop detailed technical specifications and drawings. Design, build and test control algorithms for the fuel cell system. Engage with a diverse multidisciplinary team to achieve project milestones.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIT Gandhinagar JRF 2026
content_sections.text: Interested candidates can apply online through the link: http://recruitment.iitgn.ac.in/projectstaff/ Last Date: 26 July 2026 For any queries, contact: Prof. Atul Bhargav Email: [email protected]

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: The position is temporary and project-based. Fresh graduates are also encouraged to apply. Selection will be based on application and interview performance.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Junior Research Fellow Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Gandhinagar JRF 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online application is 26 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many JRF positions are available at IIT Gandhinagar?
faq.answer: 02 posts of Junior Research Fellow are vacant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for JRF at IIT Gandhinagar?
faq.answer: Consolidated remuneration is ₹46,990 per month (including 27% HRA).

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification required for IIT Gandhinagar Fuel Cell Project JRF?
faq.answer: B.Tech/B.E. with GATE or M.Tech/M.E. in Mechanical, Electrical, Electronics, ECE, EEE, or Chemical Engineering.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for IIT Gandhinagar Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Apply online at http://recruitment.iitgn.ac.in/projectstaff/ before 26 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for IIT Gandhinagar JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Maximum 30 years as on the last date of application.

faq.question: Q7. Who is the Principal Investigator for IIT Gandhinagar UAV Fuel Cell Project?
faq.answer: Prof. Atul Bhargav, Department of Mechanical Engineering.

faq.question: Q8. What skills are preferred for IIT Gandhinagar JRF?
faq.answer: Hands-on experience in experimental setups, CAD, technical drawing, and strong teamwork skills.

faq.question: Q9. What is the duration of the JRF appointment at IIT Gandhinagar?
faq.answer: Till 18 March 2027, extendable based on performance and project availability.

faq.question: Q10. Is GATE qualification mandatory for IIT Gandhinagar JRF?
faq.answer: Yes, for B.Tech/B.E. candidates as per funding agency (DST) norms.
